Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
- Redesigned the IPC system. You can now connected any gamba plugin to add when a gamba window opens and to send live gamba info to gamba where. New folder GambaIPCSetup has instructions and example files on how to set this up.
- Slightly changed host gamba view.
- Added missing condition on find in pf button when inside a duty.
